published_prior_art.cite: Kunsch1989BlockJackknife and ParkWager2026NeymanJackknife establish the contiguous-block/SUTVA jackknife precedent; the displayed finite-sample ratio is a routine calibration.
ParkWager2026NeymanJackknife gives the recomputation framework and cycle block/Newey-West construction, but no verified schedule-uniform sqrt(M/n) expected-inflation theorem.

repo_prior_art.cite: The closest catalogue entries are exp_ego_cluster_exposure_clt_ego_cluster_polynomial_clt and exp_bipartite_minimax_design_v1; neither defines the all-update-law recomputation frontier R_n^star(M).

published_prior_art.cite: ParkWager2026NeymanJackknife treats fixed recomputation rules; HarshawMiddletonSavje2026OptimizedVariance treats quadratic conservative bounds; neither supplies an all-update-law, all-observable-proxy inflation lower bound.

novelty_flags.label: related_work / PolyanskiyWu2026DualLeCam
novelty_flags.one_line: The cited 2026 Annals paper is “Dualizing Le Cam’s method for functional estimation I: General theory”; “with applications to estimating the unseens” is the earlier preprint/series title, so the bibliography and comparison must be corrected.

soundness_flags.label: Proposition 1 (SUTVA calibration)
soundness_flags.one_line: \widehat V_L is undefined outside the prose shorthand, and constant direct effects alone allow Var_W(\widehat\tau)=0, making the displayed ratio undefined; identify it as \widehat V_{\mu_L,g_L} and assume positive variance or restrict to the schedule class.

soundness_flags.label: ass:constant-direct-effect and ass:growing-radius-regime
soundness_flags.one_line: “Strict additivity” does not standardly denote the stated constant-direct-effect-under-arbitrary-neighbor-exposures condition, and Chin2019SteinInterference does not support the asserted generic M\le n^{1-\delta} regime; retag/rejustify or supply exact supporting sources.

soundness_flags.label: ass:arc-variance-density
soundness_flags.one_line: The load-bearing lower variance bound on every arc is much stronger than ordinary nondegeneracy, while the periodic-schedule assertion supplies neither a concrete admissible family nor an applied justification.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Repair Proposition 1 by defining the block rule as (\mu_L,g_L), imposing Var_W(\widehat\tau)>0, and proving the ratio directly before using it as the M=0 calibration.

Retag or precisely source the direct-effect and growing-radius assumptions; give an explicit nondegenerate local response family that verifies the arc-variance sandwich with constants independent of n and M.

Develop the converse handle into a specified nuisance-rich family that preserves constant direct effects and arc variance while remaining indistinguishable through the proxy sigma-field; this is the decisive test of the claimed field-level frontier.
Correct the Polyanskiy--Wu bibliographic entry and distinguish the 2026 general-theory paper from the earlier applications preprint.

recommended_next_step: Continue revision on this angle: repair the calibration and assumption sourcing, then test the all-rule handle on an explicit nondegenerate indistinguishable schedule family before advancing to Stage 0.
